code: {/*CustomVideoCardContainer recibe un array objetos definida en constants.js*/}{/*CustomVideoCardContainer permite organizar una serie de videos en una unica fila.*/}import VideoCard from'./CustomVideoCard';import CustomSection from'./CustomSection';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CustomVideoCardContainer(_ref){let{videos}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"video-card-container container-fluid",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"row",children:videos.map((video,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"col-md mb-3",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomSection,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(VideoCard,{url:video.url,title:video.title,description:video.description,component:video.component})})},index))})});}export default CustomVideoCardContainer;
